description: Configures grid line visibility and styling on a 2D graph. Used as an argument inside g2d(). grid() shows grid lines; grid(noaxes) hides all axes, ticks, labels, and grid lines for a bare canvas.
utility: Show grid lines on a g2d graph with optional color, stroke, and axis visibility control

arguments.name: color
arguments.description: Grid line color, e.g., c(gray), c(lightblue)

arguments.name: strokeWidth
arguments.description: Grid line stroke width, e.g., s(0.5)

arguments.name: noaxes
arguments.description: Hides all axes, ticks, labels, and grid lines entirely (bare canvas)

arguments.name: nolines
arguments.description: Hides grid lines but keeps axes and labels visible

arguments.name: noticks
arguments.description: Hides tick marks and numeric labels but keeps axis arrows

arguments.name: axisLabels
arguments.description: Custom axis labels as strings, e.g., "Re", "Im" for complex plane

alternates.description: Show grid lines with default styling, axes visible
Hides all axes, ticks, labels, and grid lines entirely
Label axes for complex plane (Real, Imaginary)
Shows axes and labels but hides grid lines
Hides tick marks and numeric labels, keeps axis arrows
Grid lines with custom color and stroke width

alternates.syntax: g2d(at(row, col), height, width, range(-5, 5), range(-5, 5), grid(), type(plotting))
alternates.description: Enable grid lines on a plotting graph

examples.scenario: Bare canvas with no axes or grid
examples.expression: graph_1 = g2d(at(5,26), 13.3, 20.6, range(-1, 5, 1), range(-1, 5, 1), grid(noaxes), type(plotting))

examples.scenario: Complex plane with Re/Im axis labels
examples.expression: G = g2d(at(2,2), 20, 20, range(-5, 5), range(-5, 5), type(complex), grid("Re", "Im"))

examples.scenario: Graph with grid on a single range
